results.rendered_html: upahita (upa + hita) adj. gut in zweiter Reihe, n. ein secundäres Gut: vidyā śauryaṃ ca dākṣyaṃ ca balaṃ dhairyaṃ ca pañcamam . mitrāṇi sahajānyāhurvartayantīha tairbudhāḥ .. niveśanaṃ ca kupyaṃ ca kṣetraṃ bhāryā suhṛjjanaḥ . etānyupahitānyāhuḥ sarvatra labhate pumān ..  MBH. 12,5218. fg.  = upamitrāṇi  NĪLAK.

results.rendered_html:
upahita p. p.
1 Placed in or upon, deposited;  Ś. 1 ; ˚madhyamasvara  M. 1. 21  taken as a basis.
2 Preceded by.
3 Joined, mixed, connected with.
(pb)
4 Possessed of;  Śi. 16. 7. 
5 Ready; deputed to act as a spy.
6 Given, bestowed.
